LanguageData.FullyAutoHydroponics_autoHarvestDesc: Will automatically harvest mature plants in the hydroponics basin.
LanguageData.FullyAutoHydroponics_autoSowDesc: Will automatically sow plants in empty spaces in the hydroponics basin.
LanguageData.FullyAutoHydroponics_autoStoreDesc: Will automatically store harvested products in the nearest appropriate storage area.
LanguageData.FullyAutoHydroponics_harvestAllDesc: Immediately harvest or cut all plants in this hydroponics basin.
LanguageData.FullyAutoHydroponics_harvestBlightedDesc: Immediately cut all blighted plants in this hydroponics basin.
